children.heading: GEPA
children.label: a GEPA
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to supersede the privacy protections afforded parents and students under section 444 of the General Education Provisions Act ().20 U.S.C. 1232g

children.heading: Prohibition on development of national database
children.label: b Prohibition on development of national database
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to permit the development of a national database of personally identifiable information on individuals receiving services under this chapter.
